greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Vizion Hair Design — ask me about our services, prices, opening hours, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a friendly, concise assistant for Vizion Hair Design, a hidden-gem hair salon in the heart of Bath offering cuts, colour, balayage, extensions, and treatments. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: We're closed Mondays, and open Tuesday & Friday 10am-5pm, Wednesday 9.30am-8pm, Thursday 9.30am-5.30pm, and Saturday 8am-5pm.

Prices start from £30 for a blowdry, £40 for a cut & style, and £130 for a full Balayage — many colour services are quoted after a consultation. Let me know what you're after and I can point you in the right direction!
We offer cuts & styling, highlights & colour, specialist colour like Balayage and Babylights, Olaplex and Brazilian Smoothing treatments, hair extensions, and wedding hair/updos.
You can reach us on 01225 446216 or email hello@vizionhairdesign.co.uk.
We're at 19 High Street, The Corridor, Bath, BA1 5AJ — head up the stairs behind Society Café to find our hidden gem of a salon!
You can book an appointment by letting me know a day and time that suits you, and we'll check availability — or call us on 01225 446216.
Our talented team includes Kate Moon (Director), Lauren Bletso (Senior Stylist), and Brogan Thompson (Stylist) — you can check out their work on Instagram @vizionhairbath.
No problem — pop your name and contact details here and our team will get back to you, or you can call us directly on 01225 446216.
